required_language: Wellness goals qualify the patient for a hormone optimization evaluation; testosterone is considered only after provider review of symptoms, labs, fertility goals, safety gates, and expected benefit.
Address metabolic health with nutrition, exercise, sleep, body composition, and cardiometabolic risk management; do not present testosterone as diabetes or weight-loss treatment.
Testosterone therapy requires individualized risk review and monitoring, including hematocrit, BP, prostate context when appropriate, adverse effects, and symptom response.
No dosing in CDS layer; route to locked provider protocol/standing order if clinically selected.
